_comment: Reincarnation Spirit — Renegade Immortal. A being that cycles through lives. Canon: tied to the Samsara Dao concept. Appears at sites of rebirth and karmic resolution.
name: Reincarnation Spirit

canonical.appearance: A luminous, ever-shifting form that cycles between infant, child, adult, and elder appearances. Each form has different abilities. Surrounded by a wheel-like pattern of faint light.
canonical.behavior: Neutral unless attacked. Cycles through life stages every 30 seconds, changing abilities. Does not seek combat but defends itself with escalating power. Fosters growth in nearby cultivators.
canonical.habitat: Reincarnation pools, karmic nexus points, Samsara Dao comprehension sites
canonical.cultivation: Variable — each life-cycle form has a different effective realm
canonical.intelligence: 8-10 (transcendent wisdom — remembers fragments of countless past lives)
canonical.diet: Absorbs karmic energy from the cycle of life and death
canonical.relationships: Revered by cultivators on the Samsara Dao path. Attacked by karma demons (natural enemies). Sometimes guides worthy cultivators toward enlightenment.
techniques: Life cycle shift (changes form and abilities)
Karmic insight (nearby cultivators gain temporary comprehension boost)
Rebirth (revives once, returning to infant form)
Samsara wheel (AoE that ages or rejuvenates targets)
treasures: Wheel Fragment (used in Life-Death restriction comprehension)
mutations: Eternal Cycle — upon death, returns in a new form 60 seconds later with full HP
canonical.ecology: Extremely rare. Only forms at karmic nexus points where massive life-death events have occurred. Neither predator nor prey — an ecological anomaly.

art_direction.model_notes: Shifting form that cycles between four life stages. Wheel-of-light particle orbit. Serene glow.
art_direction.texture_notes: Warm golden-white glow (infant) → blue-white (child) → green-white (adult) → silver-white (elder). Rotating light ring.
